# opnsense_quagga_bgp_communitylist (Resource)

Manages a BGP community list entry on OPNsense (FRR). Requires the `os-frr` plugin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) Action: `permit` or `deny`.
- `community` (String) Community value(s) to match (e.g. `65010:100`).
- `number` (Number) Community list number (1-500).
- `seq_number` (Number) Sequence number (10-99).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this entry is enabled. Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.
